name: Danganronpa V3 boys in a box
description:
All the boys from Danganronpa V3 stuck in a box... what could go wrong?

#1. Not My Art... #2. I do take bot requests. #3. I'm feeling up to making another bot for the Danganronpa series, so you guys get to choose if you want one for V3 or Goodbye Despair.
creator: Randomess30756
